import io
import string

fn find_eq_index(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Option<Int>
  let n = string.len(s)
  if i >= n
    None
  else
    let b = string.byte_at(s, i)
    match b
    when Some(c)
      if c == 61
        Some(i)
      else
        find_eq_index(s, i + 1)
      end
    when None
      None
    end
  end
end

fn process_line(_ line: String) -> Unit
  let eq_opt = find_eq_index(line, 0)
  match eq_opt
  when None
    ()
  when Some(idx)
    if idx > 0
      let key = string.substring(line, 0, idx)
      let value = string.substring(line, idx + 1, string.len(line))
      print("#{key}:#{value}")
    end
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  mut running = true
  while running
    let line_opt = io.read_line()
    match line_opt
    when None
      running = false
    when Some(line)
      process_line(line)
    end
  end
end
